h0367f2c0gc3e9g4833g985cgb9a896c5d554: They call you outcasts. Hellspawn. Foulblood.
h5c6dd3b1gf789g4dfdgbf6fg20646fe9e0ca: But take a look out there, and tell me whose blood is staining the rocks.
h5a74e762g39cbg4098g9a10g05de5db306f1: So I've got another name for you. Nothing so grand as warriors, or heroes. Something better.
hd8a50655g6384g442cga125g103d58ca03d4: You're bloody survivors. It's a long road yet to Baldur's Gate, but I'm not worried.
he7fdd86dg1138g4575gb09cg5c393402c465: Because you know who you are, now - what you can do.
haefc644fg9477g49c6g83e5ge9ff22bf7c5f: I'll leave the worrying to whatever god or mortal is dumb enough to stand in your way.
h303a38efg8c05g43d4ga149geaf1571a5770: You. I don't have the words or the means to thank you for what you did here.
hcbc37f2fg131eg4904gbebag7c1158c588ce: But it won't be for want of trying - know that you have kin in Baldur's Gate.
h456566c1gd1cfg4517gb976g999e4de55704: Gods, I'm inclined to carry you there myself - but I know you've unfinished business out here.
h7ef48982g159ag4bf2g8442g6fd13b6708c6: If you're inclined, we'll join you at your camp. I mean to drink you under the table.
h8328b5ceg0b30g42c5gba3bg596224dbbca1: Gather your people and I'll gather mine. We can leave together, when you're ready.
h6b61934eg2d2fg44dbg93d5gd80beea5489c: Gods above, is that... Halsin? After everything, he appears just before the party. Wish I had his timing.
h4f2c79f9gc75eg4a84gb2c3gec9e22d69659: Wouldn't like to be in Kagha's shoes about now - but he'll have kinder words for you, I wager.
h678fb92fg27f3g455eg8faagcf2ed5bb602f: Find us once you're done. Twice the reason to celebrate now, eh?
h7e4f2759g5518g40abga3dega95b616e02ec: Go on, you'd best go down and... explain. Better you than me.
